title: crotalaria leptoclada var. leptoclada
intro: Crotalaria leptoclada var. leptoclada is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to tropical and subtropical regions, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine. The plant is valued for its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been associated with various health benefits, including the treatment of parasitic infections, fever, and skin conditions. Crotalaria leptoclada var. leptoclada is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the leaves or roots are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
